g.text: View a model file's PlantUML source (objective)
select a model file in the rail
show "Diagram | Source | Diff" toggle row (default Diagram)
[source not yet loaded for this path]
SourceView caches (loaded path, source text) so the
file is read once per selection, then repainted each
frame. Source depends on no rendered artifact — it is
unlike the Diagram toggle which paints the pre-rendered
